summary: Started the German Apple HIG localized UI gate from Karoline's existing chat-observed Today and Build Info screenshots. The gate fails: the German TestFlight Build Info screenshot shows English evening reflection nudge copy in the German Today surface. Preserved a doc-only gate report, marked German HIG UI readiness as not claimed, and queued a focused fix slice for the evening reflection nudge routing issue.

contract_status_changes.before: German had native-reviewed language entries and chat-observed screenshots, but no scoped Apple HIG localized UI gate result.
contract_status_changes.after: German HIG localized UI gate is started and currently failed. HIG-DE-001 records visible English evening reflection nudge copy in the German Today surface. German hig-ui-reviewed is not claimed.

residual_risks: No screenshot binaries are committed for Karoline's chat images, so this remains doc-only evidence.
The German HIG gate cannot pass until HIG-DE-001 is fixed and scoped UI evidence is preserved.
Most German surfaces remain unreviewed against the HIG gate: root tabs, primary empty states/actions, Dynamic Type, accessibility labels, and high-risk date/count/plural surfaces.
recommended_next_reason: Fix the blocking English evening reflection nudge copy before retrying the German HIG localized UI gate.
